errors.description: Required sealed archive manifest metadata is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification until manifest continuity is present

errors.description: Sealed archive root hash or archive ID does not match canonical manifest metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification on root hash mismatch

errors.description: Archive verification scope or version is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification until archive scope is deterministic

errors.description: Evidence chain head hash does not match the sealed archive.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification until evidence chain continuity is proven

errors.description: A previously observed sealed archive record was reused.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification on replayed archive records

errors.description: Archive manifest append-only position or ordering is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification when archive evidence is reordered

errors.description: Required archive evidence artifact is missing or does not match its canonical hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification until all artifacts are present and hash-bound

errors.description: Sealed archive diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny sealed audit archive verification until diagnostics are redacted and audit-safe
